predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: is_heir_of
predicates.description: The first person is an heir of the second person (the deceased).

predicates.name: served_as_main_family_residence_at_opening_of_estate
predicates.description: The property served as the main family residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

predicates.name: property_is_rented
predicates.description: The property is subject to a rental agreement (i.e. the deceased held it under a lease).

predicates.name: acquires_right_to_lease
predicates.description: The person acquires the exclusive right to the lease of the property, to the exclusion of all other heirs, as provided by Art. 4.20.

predicates.name: excluded_from_lease_right
predicates.description: The person (heir) is excluded from the right to the lease of the property in favour of the surviving spouse.
